hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, os, subprocess, sys
from pathlib import Path
inp = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT', '{}')
try:
    d = json.loads(inp)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
p = d.get('file_path', '')
if (p.startswith('reports/') and p.endswith('.json')
        and 'portfolio_analysis' not in p and 'ranking' not in p):
    root = Path('/Users/isaiasbattaglia/Documents/Agente_Analisis_clientes_actuales/etendo-migration-agent')
    result = subprocess.run(['python3', 'scripts/portfolio_analysis.py'], cwd=root, capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(result.stdout[-800:] if result.stdout else '')
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print('[portfolio-hook] ERROR:', result.stderr[-400:], file=sys.stderr)
"
